Writing

Deep dives into architecture patterns, production lessons, and technical trade-offs. No fluff, no tutorials for beginners — written for engineers who've shipped systems and want to think more carefully about them.

March 28, 2025

Cyclomatic complexity: the metric every architect should master

Cyclomatic complexity explained for architects: what it measures, thresholds that matter, how to use it to identify refactoring targets, and when to ignore it.

architecture metrics code-quality
March 15, 2025

Automating Git workflows with advanced bash scripts

Production-grade bash scripts for multi-branch Git strategies: automated rebasing, conflict detection, branch hygiene, and CI integration.

git bash automation
March 1, 2025

Rust microservices on AWS EKS: minimal viable config

Deploying Rust services to Amazon EKS with the minimum footprint: multi-stage Docker builds, IAM roles, S3 access, and Secrets Manager integration.

rust aws eks
February 10, 2025

CQRS + Event Sourcing with Vert.x: a practical guide

How to implement Command Query Responsibility Segregation and Event Sourcing on the Vert.x reactive toolkit — projections, snapshots, and real-world gotchas.

vertx cqrs event-sourcing

Hexagonal Architecture in Java: from theory to production

A deep dive into implementing Ports & Adapters in production Java services — dependency inversion, testing strategies, and real-world trade-offs.

java architecture hexagonal
